kept.text:
Why experts never start companies. Why averages don't apply to individuals. Why he spent 80% of the first year recruiting.

Bipul Sinha (@bipulsinha), Founder and CEO of @RubrikInc.

Immigrant. VC. Founder. Philosopher.

New episode of @KnuckleUpHQ is live ↓
--

00:00 Intro

01:47 State of intellect vs state of will

03:09 Bipul’s maniacal recruiting philosophy

07:06 Recruiting is like starting a religion

11:44 Will vs skill: you can teach one but not the other

14:28 Adhogāmī: fighting mental downward slopes

16:03 Why Bipul thinks product market fit is dead

19:25 Nobody knows anything (and what that means for you)

23:06 Three questions that launched Rubrik’s AI transformation

32:04 “Either you go AI or you die”

33:42 There is only one moat

35:15 When Rubrik’s growth collapsed overnight

41:28 “Maximal Thinking”: How to succeed amidst uncertainty

45:12 Quickfire round: red flags, worst VC advice, more

47:29 Bipul’s advice to his 25-year-old self

profile_bio.description: Ticker Take Founder. https://t.co/7XgWGjQNWy Inquiries: jonerlichman@viralnationtalent.com

kept.text: @Illskan Kan tycka att dela information som enskild medborgare är inte pump, jag säger inte bra eller dåligt lyfter fram fakta, då det nu finns 100.000 tals intresserad utanför Sverige. Där emot att etablerad media helt utan att kolla på AI marknaden eller bolaget, fortsätter med rubrik efter rubrik (se bild från DI nedan). Det är något du borde ta upp som dump och inte ge dig på mig. Att sitta bakom ett anon konto och säga dessa saker är värt noll, våga stå för vem du är eller så kanske du evt vara del av blankarna som för söker dumpa, då är trovärdighet liten.

kept.text:
Google Cloud SQL is one of your most critical workloads in Google Cloud. As your data estate grows, so does the need for cyber resilience. 

Rubrik now delivers immutable, automated protection for Cloud SQL that works alongside your existing disaster recovery strategy. No trade-offs. Now generally available 👉 https://t.co/kSrDAXORmr

author.name: Rubrik
author.location: Palo Alto, CA and in the ☁️

profile_bio.description: Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK), the Security and AI company, operates at the intersection of data protection, cyber resilience and enterprise AI acceleration.

kept.text:
Mythos has Moved Security’s Cheese
- Prevention is not enough
- Detection not possible
- Cybersecurity as we know it is dead

👉 Preemption is the new game
👉 Peacetime preparation for AI speed recovery 

Read more: https://t.co/sUlpklxofW

profile_bio.description: Mindless. Spaceless. Relentless. Rubrik CEO/Chairman/Co-Founder (NYSE: RBRK)

value.string_value: Mythos is a wake-up call for something that’s been true for a while now: every company needs preemptive cybersecurity. And every company needs to address the security question of our time: How fast...

kept.text:
Bipul is an inspiration in how to build a great company.

He is deeply thoughtful about how to start, how to hire, how to evolve - and his ambition is shamelessly unbounded. 

Listen to this podcast with 2 of my favorite people.
